category_sources: source_facts.description says Japanese Chess; GNU Shogi page says it plays Shogi, also known as Japanese Chess.
display_name_sources: GNU Shogi homepage and manual use GNU Shogi; source_facts.name is gnu-shogi.
docs_sources: GNU Shogi homepage links official online documentation; official manual is hosted under gnu.org/software/gnushogi/manual.
repo_sources: GNU Shogi homepage points development sources to Savannah; official Savannah cgit index lists gnushogi.git as GNU shogi.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executable identify Shogi gameplay; GNU Shogi manual describes gnushogi as a text-based game-playing engine.
